title: OpenDataLoader
description: Extract structured text, tables, and metadata from PDFs using opendataloader-pdf. Supports OCR for scanned PDFs via hybrid backend.

OPENDATALOADER_ENABLED.description: Enable PDF text extraction with opendataloader-pdf

OPENDATALOADER_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout for PDF extraction in seconds

OPENDATALOADER_FORCE_OCR.description: Use hybrid OCR backend (--hybrid docling-fast) for scanned/image-based PDFs. Requires opendataloader-pdf-hybrid server running.

OPENDATALOADER_HYBRID_URL.description: URL of the opendataloader-pdf-hybrid server (e.g. http://localhost:5002). If empty, uses the default built-in URL.

OPENDATALOADER_ARGS_EXTRA.description: Extra arguments to append to opendataloader-pdf command
